name: Hazel
description: Automated file organization — monitor folders and apply rules to sort, rename, and manage files

extraction.notes: Exact Sparkle feed URL is in the app bundle's Info.plist (SUFeedURL key). The URL shown is the most likely path. Noodlesoft uses Sparkle 1 (legacy). The download enclosure URL is obfuscated with placeholder characters (//). The actual download URL must be extracted from the appcast enclosure element at check time.

download.notes: Download URL is obfuscated in the Sparkle appcast enclosure. The URL contains placeholder characters (//) that must be resolved at runtime. The enclosure URL in the appcast item is the only authoritative source for the download link.

changelog.notes: Release notes typically in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> pointing to a noodlesoft.com page, or inline in <description>.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase with free trial). By Noodlesoft (Paul Kim). Uses legacy Sparkle 1 with obfuscated download URLs in the appcast. The enclosure URL in the appcast may contain placeholder tokens that need to be resolved — scraping the appcast at check time is the only reliable way to get the download URL. Also available on Mac App Store.
